result:
All changes are complete. Here's a summary of what was done:

## Changes Made

### 1. Version bump (`gradle/libs.versions.toml`)
- Changed `androidxActivity` from `"1.9.3"` to `"1.10.1"`

### 2. Removed custom `LocalActivity` (`core/ui/compose/common/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/core/ui/compose/common/activity/LocalActivity.kt`)
- Removed the custom `val LocalActivity = staticCompositionLocalOf<ComponentActivity>` definition
- Simplified `setActivityContent` to just delegate to the official `setContent` (which now auto-provides `LocalActivity` in AndroidX Activity 1.10.x)
- Removed unused imports (`CompositionLocalProvider`, `staticCompositionLocalOf`)

### 3. Updated imports in 7 files
Changed `import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.activity.LocalActivity` to `import androidx.activity.compose.LocalActivity` in:
- `feature/settings/import/.../SettingsImportScreen.kt`
- `feature/launcher/.../FeatureLauncherNavHost.kt`
- `feature/launcher/.../FeatureLauncherApp.kt`
- `feature/funding/googleplay/.../ContributionScreen.kt`
- `feature/account/server/settings/.../ClientCertificateInput.kt`
- `feature/account/server/settings/.../TextFieldOutlinedPasswordBiometric.kt`
- `feature/funding/googleplay/.../ContributionScreenKtTest.kt` (test file)

### 4. Updated detekt configuration (`config/detekt/detekt.yml`)
- Removed `LocalActivity` from `CompositionLocalAllowlist` since the official one from AndroidX doesn't need to be allowlisted

### 5. Updated dependency guard files (8 files)
- Updated all `androidx.activity:activity-compose`, `activity-ktx`, and `activity` entries from `1.9.3` to `1.10.1` in all dependency guard files under `app-k9mail/dependencies/` and `app-thunderbird/dependencies/`
